tasks.subject: Task 1: Add migration 003 — nullable columns + type/status
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Alter the request table to support meta requests and lifecycle tracking.

**Files:**
- Create: `db/migrations/003_request_type_status.sql`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `provider_id`, `endpoint_path`, `status_code`, `time_spent_ms` are nullable
- [ ] `type` column exists as INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1
- [ ] `status` column exists as INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0

**Verify:** `mise run server` starts without error

```json:metadata
{"files": ["db/migrations/003_request_type_status.sql"], "verifyCommand": "mise run server", "acceptanceCriteria": ["provider_id/endpoint_path/status_code/time_spent_ms nullable", "type column INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1", "status column INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Update sqlc queries and regenerate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace InsertRequest with full-column insert, add UpdateRequestOnHeader and UpdateRequestOnComplete, update ListRequests with type filter.

**Files:**
- Modify: `db/queries/routing.sql`
- Modify: `db/queries/request.sql`
- Regenerated: `pkg/db/*.go`

**Verify:** `sqlc generate && go build ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["db/queries/routing.sql", "db/queries/request.sql", "pkg/db/"], "verifyCommand": "sqlc generate && go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["InsertRequest accepts all 17 columns", "UpdateRequestOnHeader and UpdateRequestOnComplete exist", "ListRequests has type filter"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add request constants and fix contract types
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Define Go constants for request type/status, update RequestView and ToRequestView.

**Files:**
- Create: `pkg/db/request_constants.go`
- Modify: `pkg/contract/request.go`

**Verify:** `go build ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/db/request_constants.go", "pkg/contract/request.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["RequestTypeMeta/Upstream constants exist", "RequestStatusPending/HeaderReceived/Completed/Failed constants exist", "RequestView has Type and Status fields", "ToRequestView maps new columns"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Update handle_requests.go for new ListRequests params
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Fix the request handler to use the new ListRequestsParams shape.

**Files:**
- Modify: `pkg/server/handle_requests.go`

**Verify:** `go build ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/server/handle_requests.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["handleListRequests passes Type filter", "all nullable fields handled correctly"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Rewrite gateway recording logic — meta/upstream span model
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace logRequest with two-phase span model. Insert meta request on arrival, upstream per attempt, backfill on header and completion.

**Files:**
- Modify: `pkg/server/gateway_helpers.go`
- Modify: `pkg/server/handle_gateway.go`

**Verify:** `go build ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/server/gateway_helpers.go", "pkg/server/handle_gateway.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["meta request inserted on arrival", "upstream request per attempt", "two-phase backfill on header and complete", "failed upstreams recorded with status=3"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Regenerate OpenAPI spec
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update openapi.yaml and dashboard types for new type/status fields.

**Files:**
- Modified: `openapi.yaml`
- Modified: `dashboard/src/api.d.ts`

**Verify:** `mise run openapi && pnpm --dir dashboard type-check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["openapi.yaml", "dashboard/src/api.d.ts"], "verifyCommand": "mise run openapi && pnpm --dir dashboard type-check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["openapi.yaml has type/status in RequestView", "openapi.yaml has type filter on listRequests", "dashboard types regenerated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Smoke test end-to-end
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify full flow: server starts, gateway request creates meta + upstream rows, backfill works.

**Files:** None (testing only)

**Verify:** Manual curl + psql query

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "manual test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["meta request type=0 created", "upstream request type=1 created", "span relationship correct", "status transitions work"]}
```
